message: perf: speed up gifdecode and add fixtures

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# GIF sources + licensing
+
+This repo includes small GIF fixtures for decoder tests. Sources and licenses:
+
+- animexample2.gif
+  - Original: Animexample2.gif
+  - Source: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:FilePath/Animexample2.gif
+  - License: Public Domain
+- youtube-loading-3.gif
+  - Original: YouTube_loading_symbol_3_(transparent).gif
+  - Source: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:FilePath/YouTube_loading_symbol_3_(transparent).gif
+  - License: CC0
+- knowledge-human-pink.gif
+  - Original: Knowledge_Is_Human_animated_pink_transparent_background.gif
+  - Source: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:FilePath/Knowledge_Is_Human_animated_pink_transparent_background.gif
+  - License: CC0
+- animation-loading1.gif
+  - Original: Animation_-_Loading1.gif
+  - Source: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:FilePath/Animation_-_Loading1.gif
+  - License: CC0
+- walk-cycle.gif
+  - Original: Walk-Cycle.gif
+  - Source: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:FilePath/Walk-Cycle.gif
+  - License: CC BY 3.0

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+package gifdecode
+
+import (
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"testing"
+)
+
+func readFixture(t testing.TB, name string) []byte {
+	t.Helper()
+	path := filepath.Join("testdata", name)
+	data, err := os.ReadFile(path)
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("read fixture: %v", err)
+	}
+	return data
+}
